# ace Test Fixtures

This directory contains generators and static data for test fixtures used
by the ace package manager test suite.

## Structure

```
fixtures/
  README.md         — This file
  gen_fixtures.v    — Top-level orchestration: builds all fixture artifacts
  gen_core_db.v     — Generates minimal .db.tar sync databases (zstd-compressed)
  gen_pkg_tar_zst.v — Generates minimal .pkg.tar.zst package archives
  gen_local_db.v    — Generates minimal local database directories
  output/           — Generated fixture artifacts (gitignored)
```

## Fixture Types

### 1. Sync Databases (`output/*.db`)

Generated by `gen_core_db.v`. Each is a tar archive (optionally compressed with
zstd) containing a `desc` key-value entry per package, in the format:

```
pkgname-version/
  desc       — %KEY% metadata
  depends    — dependency specifiers (one per line)
  files      — file manifest (one path per line)
```

Provided fixtures:

| Fixture | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `core.db` | Minimal repo with 3 packages: glibc, pacman, linux |
| `empty.db` | Empty database (just tar archive, no packages) |
| `circular.db` | Packages with circular dependency (A→B→C→A) |
| `epoch.db` | Packages with epoch-prefixed versions (e.g. 2:1.0-1) |
| `large.db` | 100+ packages with realistic metadata for benchmarking |

### 2. Package Archives (`output/*.pkg.tar.zst`)

Generated by `gen_pkg_tar_zst.v`. Each is a tar archive compressed with zstd
containing at minimum `.PKGINFO` metadata in key=value format:

```
.PKGINFO       — Package metadata (key = value format)
.BUILDINFO     — Build environment info (optional)
.MTREE         — File tree hashes (optional)
.INSTALL       — Install scriptlet (optional)
usr/           — Real files and directories
usr/bin/
usr/bin/hello
```

Provided fixtures:

| Fixture | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `hello-1.0-1-x86_64.pkg.tar.zst` | Minimal package with single binary |
| `libfoo-2.1-3-x86_64.pkg.tar.zst` | Library package with shared libs |
| `epoch-2:1.0-1-any.pkg.tar.zst` | Package with epoch in version |
| `scriptlet-1.0-1-x86_64.pkg.tar.zst` | Package with .INSTALL scriptlet |

### 3. Local Database (`output/local/`)

Generated by `gen_local_db.v`. A pacman-format local database tree:

```
local/
  ALPM_DB_VERSION  — Contains "9\n"
  pkgname-version/
    desc           — %KEY% format metadata
    files          — %FILES% and %BACKUP% sections
```

## Usage

Generate all fixtures:

```bash
v run tests/fixtures/gen_fixtures.v
```

Or generate individual fixture types:

```bash
v run tests/fixtures/gen_core_db.v
v run tests/fixtures/gen_pkg_tar_zst.v
v run tests/fixtures/gen_local_db.v
```

Generated artifacts appear under `tests/fixtures/output/` and are loaded by the
compat suite and integration tests.

## Adding New Fixtures

1. Add generator code to the appropriate `gen_*.v` file.
2. Document the new fixture in this README.
3. Run the generator to produce the artifact.
4. Reference the artifact in your test code.
